title: pleurostima gounelleana
side_effects: Pleurostima gounelleana can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and vomiting, due to its toxic compounds. Ingestion of excessive amounts may also lead to headaches, dizziness, and nausea. In rare cases, improper use of the plant can cause allergic reactions, such as skin irritation and respiratory problems, especially in individuals with pre-existing conditions. Furthermore, uncontrolled use of Pleurostima gounelleana may interact with certain medications, exacerbating health issues like high blood pressure and kidney problems.
